Introduction
Today’s world is digital, and hence, a personal portfolio not only shows the works done by an individual but also his/her passions, dedication, technical skills, and personal growth. This digital space enables one to go through the skills possessed, experiences, internships done, and accomplishments.
Welcome to my portfolio.
My name is Krishpreet Singh Ahluwalia, although people generally call me Krishpreet. I love technology, digital marketing, web designing, SEO, artificial intelligence, Graphic designing and business management. My belief is that learning takes place effectively when knowledge is applied practically through projects.
My portfolio has been made to share all that I have done in terms of works, experiences, internships, and achievements. Whether you are a recruiter, a client, another student, or simply a tech lover, I am sure that this page would be beneficial for you.
In my life, I have always tried to balance creative skills with analysis skills. Each web design, SEO process, and every other project helps me grow as a future digital professional.
Who is Krishpreet?
Krishpreet is a student, aspiring web developer, and a tech lover who loves creating state-of-the-art solutions with an ever-learning attitude about latest technology trends. Rather than restricting learning to books only, I think practical implementation is the quickest way of acquiring useful skills.
From website design, to search engine optimization, to digital marketing techniques, to user experience, to business analysis; I have always found great interest in technologies and their implementations.
Inquisitiveness has been one of the major driving factors behind all my learning efforts. With each technology I learn, I gain some important knowledge which eventually finds its place into my work.
I love to solve problems using technology and keep on challenging myself by implementing projects which involve extensive research and learning processes.
Along with all the technical learning, I participate in different contests, internships, workshops and group projects for honing my professional and personal skills.
This portfolio is a result of such learning.
My Way to Technology
Like most students, I began studying technology due to curiosity.
At first, I wondered how websites were made and how business people established their strong web presence. My curiosity led to studying website development, WordPress, SEO, and digital marketing.
In place of studying tutorials, I began to do projects.
Each project brought me closer to some new piece of knowledge whether it was website optimization, responsive design, user experience, SEO implementation, performance improvement, or content organization.
As I discovered more and more about technology, I became interested in digital marketing which is a combination of such fields as creativity, analytics, brand creation, and technology.
Nowadays, I am still gaining more knowledge in:

• Search Engine Optimization (SEO)

• Website Development

• Graphic Designing

• Artificial Intelligence Tools

• Digital Marketing

• Website Performance Optimization

• Business Analysis

• Personal Branding
I don’t consider technology as a field to study, but as means of creating valuable solutions for users.
Education
For my secondary education, I went to school Manav Sthali School and completed the curriculum in 2025, with a Non-Medical background. Science has developed my logical reasoning and problem-solving skills and instilled in me the curiosity for technology that became the basis of my interests in web development, digital marketing, and technology in general.
Currently I am studying at Guru Tegh Bahadur Institute of Technology (GTBIT) in the framework of my higher education process. I am doing Btech course in computer science with specialization in Artifical intelligence and machine learning.
Professional Experience
Intern — Business Management Analyst
Aakrish Chinar Hospitality
The most significant highlight in my career experience has been an intern at Business Management Analyst in Aakrish Chinar Hospitality.
I got practical exposure about business operations, analysis, strategic planning, and organizational management during this internship.
Through the internship, I got to know how businesses detect problems and take appropriate action through analysis and efficiency in operations.
There were various areas in which I had experience including:

• Business process analysis

• AirBnb

• Makemytrip

• Strategic planning

• Problem solving

• Research and reporting

• Collaboration

• Professional communication

• Analysis-based decision making
This has made me well aware of the integration of technology with business strategies to accomplish organizational goals.
Moreover, it made me confident enough in addressing business problems.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Internship Profile of Web Management & SEO Executive
Vishal Landbase Pvt. Ltd.
During my internship as Web Management & SEO Executive at Vishal Landbase Pvt. Ltd., I gained much in terms of my technical and digital marketing knowledge.
I had the opportunity to work in the areas of website management, SEO, website content optimization and keeping up an online presence.
This was a good opportunity for me to learn that once the website has been created, the next thing to do is to optimize the website for the user and search engines.
The roles assigned to me were:

• Website management

• On-page SEO

• Off-page SEO

• Technical SEO

• Keyword research

• Website performance analysis

• Improvement of website performance from a user perspective

• Content management
Through the above internship, I was able to put into practice some SEO ideas and gain more knowledge of how websites create visibility through search engines.
Skills
With the passage of time, Krishpreet has gained a good balance of technical, marketing and business skills.
Few of the essential skills are:

• Web Development

• HTML,CSS,Javascript

• Python

• MySql

• WordPress

• Angular

• SEO

• On Page SEO

• Technical SEO

• Keyword Research

• Content Optimization

• Image SEO

• Website Audit

• Digital Marketing

• Personal Branding

• Content Strategy

• Social Media Optimization

• Website Growth

• Digital Presence

• Business Analysis

• Market Research

• Strategy

• Teamwork

• WordPress

• Rank Math SEO

• Google Search Console

• Google Analytics

• GitHub

• Canva

• AI Productivity Tools
These skills keep on developing and improving via practical application, hands-on experience, certifications and collab
Projects Developed by Me
One of the most useful parts of my journey has been the process of turning ideas into actual digital projects. Each project I include in my portfolio provides me with a chance to learn and develop myself both in terms of skills and problem solving. Instead of making projects just for educational purposes, I have tried to create something that would be functional in the real world and at the same time improve my skills in web development and other digital technologies.
Every project helped me to grow in some specific aspect.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

AutoVault
AutoVault is one of my best projects demonstrating my expertise in creating a structured and well-designed web application. The goal of this project was to create a state-of-the-art digital solution with an easy-to-navigate and efficient design.
While working on AutoVault, I tried to create a pleasant user experience with a good organization of the content, efficient layout, and appealing visual design. Every single part of the web application was designed in such a way to provide the visitors with an access to information without any difficulties.
This project helped me to get deeper into the concept of responsive design and to learn how to develop a website performing efficiently in all devices including desktop, tablet, and mobile computers.
This project has helped me to improve my skills in organizing websites, designing the interface, and optimizing performance of the applications.
Skills Demonstrated

• Web Development

• UI/UX Design

• User Authentication system

• Website Optimization

• Performance Enhancement

• Content Organization

• Problem Solving
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Waltrix
Waltrix is yet another major milestone in my portfolio. With this project, I faced the challenge of moving away from the purely design aspect and looking into function and consistency, as well as user engagement.
With the development of Waltrix, I paid special attention to the creation of an interface that would provide the visitor with a smooth and pleasant interaction. All pages were created taking into account the layout, accessibility, readability and navigability of the site.
The development of Waltrix taught me how to present complex information in a modern and professional manner, as well as helped me gain experience in organizing the website structure.
Along with the technical aspect of the work, Waltrix helped me realize the importance of proper planning prior to the development of the website.
Skills Acquired

• Website Development

• User Authentication

• User Experience

• Graphic Designing

• Content Management
Stormeyt — Live Weather
Stormeyt — Live Weather is an example of the interactive applications that I am interested in developing which offer valuable information to the user.
The application aims at providing the weather updates through an aesthetically pleasing and functional interface, showing my knowledge about the integration of functionality and user experience design.
Designing the application allowed me to gain skills in dealing with dynamic data and designing interfaces which present information efficiently. I also learned the value of proper layout designing for various devices while keeping the application simple enough to use.
This project considerably increased my skills in developing applications which are well designed, responsive, and functional.
Skills Demonstrated

• API Deployment

• Angular Frontend

• Angular Backend

• User Interface Design

• Live API usage

• API Automation
Certifications, Leadership & Continuous Learning
One of the best experience in my journey so far is being a Junior Volunteer of IEEE GTBIT Student Branch. As a Junior Volunteer, I was able to contribute to technical events and participate in various initiatives, which are related to innovation, knowledge transfer and professional development. My affiliation to IEEE enabled me to gain leadership, communication, teamwork and event management skills as well as exposed me to a great technology community.
Apart from organizational commitments, I continue updating myself by acquiring knowledge on topics like web development, SEO, digital marketing, artificial intelligence and business strategy via self-learning. Any newly acquired skills have been put into practice through my various projects.
Continuous learning is extremely important in this era where technologies keep changing constantly, and thus I am committed to acquiring more knowledge.
Achievements
One of my biggest achievements is winning First Prize in the Business Heist event conducted in Uddham by Entrepreneurship Cell (E-cell) of Mata Sundari College. As a member of the team, I studied different real life problems faced by businesses and created strategies to solve them. Winning this competition proved how imp
